metadata.name: fastapi-create-project
metadata.summary: A tool to generate FastAPI project structures

functions.name: fastapi_project_gen.generator.generate_project
documentation: Generate a FastAPI project structure with models, views, routes, schemas, requirements.txt, and README.md.

functions.name: fastapi_project_gen.generator.main
documentation:
Main entry point for the library when used as a CLI tool.
Prompts the user for input if no arguments are provided.
